title: Dynamic Hitboxes
description: Gives players a hitbox when using an elytra or swimming, good for PvP
body: This is dynamic hitboxes! It is a mod that simply shows players hitboxes in fabric java 1.21.10 and 1.21.11 when using items that change the users hitbox like elytra or swimming. This makes it easier for example to hit someone flying in Mace PvP.
